latex: The ratio of the number of games won to the number of games lost (no ties) by the Middle School Middies is 11 to 4. To the nearest whole percent, what percent of its games did the team lose?
notes: }  \textbf{Answer:} The Won/Lost ratio is 11/4 so, for some number $N$, the team won $11N$ games and lost $4N$ games. Thus, the team played $15N$ games and the fraction of games lost is $\dfrac{4N}{15N}=\dfrac{4}{15}\approx 0.27=\boxed{27\ }
